articles.description: Watch TV coverage, listen to radio commentary, follow live text updates, and keep up to date with the latest score and match stats as Wales take on Bosnia-Herzegovina in the semi-finals of FIFA World Cup Qualifying.
articles.title: FIFA World Cup Qualifying semi-final LIVE: Wales vs Bosnia-Herzegovina - TV coverage, radio commentary, text, score & stats updates

articles.description: All the build-up to Fifa World Cup play-off semi-final between Italy and Northern Ireland in Bergamo, Italy
articles.title: Fifa World Cup Qualifying semi-final LIVE: Build-up to Italy v Northern Ireland

articles.description: Live text updates as the Czech Republic hist the Republic of Ireland in World Cup qualifying semi-final play-off.
articles.title: Fifa World Cup qualifying semi-final: Build-up to Czech Republic v Republic of Ireland

articles.description: Max Verstappen ejects a journalist from his news conference at the Japanese Grand Prix over a row that dates back to Abu Dhabi last year.
articles.title: Max Verstappen expels journalist from Japan GP press conference

articles.description: American Coco Gauff cruises past 13th seed Karolina Muchova in straight sets to reach her first Miami Open final.
articles.title: Miami Open: American Coco Gauff cruises into first final of tournament

articles.description: Graham Potter's Sweden are one win from qualifying for the World Cup after Viktor Gyokeres scores a hat-trick in their 3-1 play-off semi-final win over Ukraine.
articles.title: World Cup play-offs: Viktor Gyokeres hat-trick sends Sweden through as Kosovo keep World Cup dream alive

articles.description: The women's category of Olympic sports will be limited to biological females from 2028, says the International Olympic Committee.
articles.title: Women's Olympic sports limited to biological females from 2028 - IOC

articles.description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says Ben White must "clear the air" with his team-mates after returning to the England squad for the first time since 2022.
articles.title: Ben White: Defender must clear air with England team-mates after return, says Thomas Tuchel

articles.description: Luke Littler and Michael van Gerwen in action on night eight of Premier League Darts in Berlin - follow live scores and updates.
articles.title: Premier League Darts LIVE: Luke Littler vs Gerwyn Price in Berlin - scores, results & updates

articles.description: Northampton head coach Sam Vesty questions whether England have lost their rugby identity under Steve Borthwick
articles.title: England rugby: Sam Vesty  asks 'where is England's identity?'
